# Mundial26
> Every FIFA World Cup 2026 match in your timezone with one-click Google Calendar integration.

## What is Mundial26?
Mundial26 (mundial26.pisharath.dev) is a free web tool
that shows the complete FIFA World Cup 2026 group stage
schedule converted to the user's local timezone. Users
can add any match directly to Google Calendar, download
.ics files for Apple Calendar or Outlook, or share match
timings via WhatsApp. No account, no app, no signup required.

## Key features
- 72 group stage matches with automatic timezone conversion
- Default timezone: IST (India Standard Time, UTC+5:30)
- Supported timezones: IST, GMT, BST, CET, ET, PT, CST, GST, AST, JST, SGT
- One-click Google Calendar integration
- .ics download for Apple Calendar and Outlook
- WhatsApp share with pre-written IST message
- Today's Matches section
- Card view and table view toggle
- Filter by group (A-L) and search by team name
- Knockout stage schedules added after June 27 2026

## Tournament facts
- Tournament: FIFA World Cup 2026
- Host countries: United States, Canada, Mexico
- Dates: June 11 to July 19, 2026
- Teams: 48
- Total matches: 104
- Group stage matches: 72
- Groups: A through L
- Final: July 19, 2026 at MetLife Stadium, New Jersey, 3:00 PM ET

## Key timezone conversions
- 3:00 PM ET = 8:00 PM BST = 9:00 PM CET = 12:30 AM IST (+1) = 11:00 PM GST
- 6:00 PM ET = 11:00 PM BST = 12:00 AM CET (+1) = 3:30 AM IST (+1) = 2:00 AM GST (+1)
- 9:00 PM ET = 2:00 AM BST (+1) = 3:00 AM CET (+1) = 6:30 AM IST (+1) = 5:00 AM GST (+1)
- 12:00 AM ET = 5:00 AM BST = 6:00 AM CET = 9:30 AM IST = 8:00 AM GST

## Groups and teams
- Group A: Mexico, South Africa, South Korea, Czechia
- Group B: Canada, Bosnia, Qatar, Switzerland
- Group C: Brazil, Morocco, Haiti, Scotland
- Group D: USA, Paraguay, Australia, Turkiye
- Group E: Germany, Curacao, Ivory Coast, Ecuador
- Group F: Netherlands, Japan, Sweden, Tunisia
- Group G: Belgium, Egypt, Iran, New Zealand
- Group H: Spain, Cape Verde, Saudi Arabia, Uruguay
- Group I: France, Senegal, Iraq, Norway
- Group J: Argentina, Algeria, Austria, Jordan
- Group K: Portugal, DR Congo, Uzbekistan, Colombia
- Group L: England, Croatia, Ghana, Panama

Switchcompany — switchcompany.co
Developer: Achuth
